dataset: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey)

pi_items.source: Task setup script (setup_task.sh:14-17) resets facility ID 1 to placeholder state
Task description and metadata. No real medical facility with this exact name found. This is a task-specific synthetic value.

pi_items.verified_value: 12-3456789 is a standard test/example EIN format used by IRS for illustration purposes, not a real EIN
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed 12-3456789 is the standard IRS example format for demonstrating EIN structure. This is synthetic.
Web search did not find admin@librehealth.org as an official LibreHealth contact email. This is a synthetic test value for the task.

pi_items.verified_value: The official LibreHealth organization website is https://librehealth.io/, NOT https://www.librehealth.org. The task metadata contains incorrect domain.
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed official LibreHealth website is https://librehealth.io/ (from librehealth.io, GitHub, GitLab official sources)

pi_items.verified_value: 555-0199 is a fictional/test phone number reserved specifically for fictional use in North America
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed 555-0100 through 555-0199 are reserved for fictional use per North American Numbering Plan. Not a real phone number.
Task setup and verifier code use billing_location value of 1 as the expected value (verifier.py:41, export_result.sh:30)

privileged_info_summary: This task involves configuring synthetic facility details in a LibreHealth EHR instance running NHANES real patient data. The facility metadata values are all test/synthetic: the name 'LibreHealth Medical Center', EIN '12-3456789' (standard IRS example format), phone '555-0199' (reserved fictional number), and email 'admin@librehealth.org' are not real organization values. The website URL in metadata (https://www.librehealth.org) contradicts the actual LibreHealth official website (https://librehealth.io/). The underlying patient database contains real NHANES data (9,375 patients), but the task itself is about setting synthetic facility configuration values.
